sections.sectionTitle: A Manin Pasian' Thukhenna Hangin Lungdamna

verses.text: Ka lungsim khempeuh tawh Topa tungah lungdamna kong ko ding a, na bawl a lamdangte khempeuh ka gen ding hi
Nangma hangin nuamin ka diang ding a, na min phatna ka sa ding hi, Sangpenpa aw
Ka galte a nungkik ciangin, nangma mai-ah amaute pukin kisia uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh keima thutan'na na hong kipsak a, tokhom tungah tu-in thu a manin na khen hi
Minamte na taii a, migilote na susia hi. A maimang dingin amau' min na phiat hi
Siat denna sungah galte beimang hi. A khuate uh na zunglot a, amaute kiphawkkha nawnlo hi
Topa ahih leh kumpi za-ah tu ngitnget a, thukhenna dingin a tokhom a bawl hi
Leitung mite' thu a mantakin khen a, a kilawm bangin mite' thu a khen hi
Topa pen, netniamna a thuakte-a' dingin munkip hi a, haksat hun ciangin munmuan'huai ahi hi
Topa aw, nang a hong zongte nusialo na hih manin, na min a theite in nang hong muang uh hi
Zion-ah a om Topa phatna la sa un! Ama nasepnate mite' lakah gen un
Bang hang hiam cih leh mi thahna a huapa in amaute phawk a, a thuak mite' awging amah in mangngilhlo hi
Ka tungah hong dik in, Topa! Sihna pan hong honkhiapa aw, kei hong mudahte' hangin keima gim thuaknate hong en in la
nangmah a hong kiphatnate phawk kikkik in la, na hong hotkhiatna hangin Jerusalem khuasungah ka nuamna ka gengen ding hi
Amau' bawlsa gum sung mahah minamte kiasuk uh a, a ngenthang siahna uhah amau' khe mah a awk hi
Topa in thu hong khenin migilote amau' nasepna mahah awksakna tawh amah hong kilang hi
Pasian a mangngilh minam khempeuh sung panin migilote, Leinuai-ah pai ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh mi cimawhte kimangngilh denlo ding a, mizawngte' lametna bei paisuaklo ding hi
Tho in, Topa! Mi kizosak ke'n; na mai-ah minamte sam in la, amaute' tungah thu khen in
Amaute lausak in, Topa! Mi ahih lelna uh minamte theisak in!
